nasb.text: But when these things begin to take place, straighten up and lift up your heads, because your redemption is drawing near.”

esv.text: Now when these things begin to take place, straighten up and raise your heads, because your redemption is drawing near.”

cnv.text: 一有這些事，你們就當挺身昂首，因為你們的救贖近了。”

ccb.text: 当这些事发生时，你们要昂首挺胸，因为你们蒙救赎的日子近了。”

csbs.text: 这些事一开始发生，你们就当挺起身、抬起头，因为你们的救赎近了。”
